title: torenia taishanensis
intro: Torenia taishanensis, also known as Taishan torenia or Chinese torenia, is a plant species in the family Linderniaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Torenia taishanensis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as hypertension and atherosclerosis. Torenia taishanensis is often prepared as a decoction or tea for consumption, and its leaves and flowers can also be used to make capsules or tablets for medicinal purposes.
